title: UAE vs US NRIs: Why FCNR(B) deposits are more tax-efficient for non-resident Indians in the Gulf nation
summary: An FCNR account functions as a foreign currency-denominated repository that allows Non-Resident Indians or Persons of Indian Origin to hold their funds securely.

title: ITR filing deadline for AY 2026-27: July 31, August 31 or October 31? Check which date applies for you
summary: The Income Tax Department has set different ITR filing deadlines for AY 2026-27 based on income source and audit status. Key dates include July 31 for ITR-1/2, August 31 for ITR-3/4 (non-audit) and October 31 for ITR-3/4 (audit). Penalties apply for late filing.

title: ‘ ₹1.1 lakh on rent, ₹20,000 on groceries’: Indian Man's Poland expense breakdown sparks debate online
summary: An Indian man living in Warsaw, Poland, has sparked a discussion online after revealing how much he and his partner spend each month to maintain a 'comfortable lifestyle'.

title: Best fixed deposit rates in June 2026: Compare FD interest of top SFBs with private and public sector banks
summary: Among all lenders, small finance banks dominate the list of top-paying fixed deposits. Suryoday Small Finance Bank and Utkarsh Small Finance Bank are currently offering up to 8.10% on select tenures, making them among the most rewarding choices for depositors.

title: Sebi's new ETF framework: How will it impact investors? Experts answer
summary: Will ETFs trade closer to their underlying value after Sebi's overhaul? Experts explain what the changes could mean for traders and long-term investors.

title: EPFO 3.0: How will your PF withdrawal be taxed? Key rules and exemptions explained
summary: EPFO subscribers may soon withdraw provident fund money via UPI without employer sign-off, enhancing speed and convenience. However, tax implications of this new method remain unclear.&nbsp;

title: 8th pay commission: No more half-day CL for every late attendance? Key demands on attendance and leave rules
summary: The 8th Pay Commission is reviewing attendance rules, with employee unions requesting more flexibility for late arrivals. They propose allowing up to two hours late without penalty, changing the current half-day casual leave deduction for additional late instances.

title: Form 40: How Indians returning from abroad can defer tax on foreign retirement accounts
summary: Form 40 is suitable for resident individuals in India who hold retirement benefit accounts in certain notified countries, such as the US, UK, Canada, and Australia, and want to avoid immediate taxation in India on income that is not yet actually withdrawn or redeemed.

title: Can a retiree claim tax credit on spouse’s fixed deposit? TDS rules explained
summary: Since the interest earned on the deposit is subject to the clubbing provisions, it is not treated as the spouse’s taxable income. Therefore, they are not eligible to furnish the Form 121 declaration.

title: Mutual funds vs PMS: A complete guide to minimum investment, portfolio structure and investor fit
summary: Mutual funds pool money from multiple investors and are generally more accessible and suitable for a wide range of investors. On the other hand, PMS offers a personalised investment experience where portfolios are tailored to an individual's financial goals, risk appetite, and preferences.

title: US stocks: Nasdaq, S&P fall over 1% as Fed holds rates; traders raise hike bets
summary: US stocks tumbled Wednesday as traders anticipated a Federal Reserve rate hike, with policymakers projecting rising interest rates later this year. New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh emphasized taming inflation, shifting sentiment from expected rate cuts. This hawkish tilt led to significant market declines

title: US Federal Reserve keeps interest rates unchanged, projects one rate hike for 2026
summary: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at 3.5%-3.75% in Kevin Warsh's first meeting, with policymakers signaling potential rate hikes to combat surging inflation. summary: The National Stock Exchange of India has filed draft papers for its initial public offering. This move positions NSE for one of the country's major IPOs this year. It follows a previous attempt in 2016 that was delayed. NSE is India's largest stock exchange and a leading global derivatives market. T

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday
summary: Indian equities advanced for a fourth straight session as easing geopolitical tensions, lower crude oil prices, softer bond yields and a stronger rupee boosted sentiment. Gains in IT, metals and PSU banks lifted benchmarks, while India VIX remained subdued amid improving market confidence.

title: Market Trading Guide: Titagarh Rail among 2 stock recommendations for Thursday
summary: Indian equities extended their recovery amid easing US-Iran tensions and softer crude prices. title: HDFC MF, ADIA among buyers as Sepia Investments offloads Rs 749 crore in Corona Remedies via block deal
summary: Sepia Investments and Anchor Partners sold shares worth about Rs 777 crore in Corona Remedies through block deals. HDFC Mutual Fund emerged as the largest buyer, while several institutional investors, including Aberdeen entities, ADIA, Invesco and WhiteOak, also accumulated stakes.

title: Rupee hits six-week high on RBI measures and dollar inflow hopes
summary: The rupee extended its gains to close at 94.53 against the US dollar, supported by RBI measures to boost foreign currency inflows, softer crude prices and expectations of stronger FCNR-B deposit inflows. The currency touched a six-week high before trimming intraday gains.

title: US stocks: US market ticks up ahead of first Fed policy decision under Warsh
summary: U.S. stock indexes opened higher on Wednesday, with chip stocks rebounding ahead of the Federal Reserve's first interest rate decision under new Chair Kevin Warsh. The Dow Jones Industrial Average, S&P 500, and Nasdaq Composite all saw gains in early trading.

title: BRND.ME converts into public company, eyes IPO in 12-18 months
summary: BRND.ME, formerly Mensa Brands, has converted into a public company after shifting its corporate base to India. The consumer brands platform is preparing for a potential IPO within 12-18 months, backed by stronger governance, profitability and a streamlined corporate structure.

title: Sebi warns of no regulatory recourse for investors trading in unlisted securities
summary: Sebi has cautioned investors against trading unlisted securities through unauthorized websites and electronic platforms.
